description_long: This house is situated on a sloped, landscaped plot with a modern, boxy architectural design. The structure features a flat roof and large, rectangular windows that provide ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front approach includes a wide staircase leading up to a raised deck, bordered by a low fence that follows the contours of the terrain. The house is elevated on stilts at the front, accommodating the slope and creating a spacious undercroft. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and beige, with wooden accents on the deck and steps. The property is enclosed by a perimeter fence, and the landscaping is primarily grass with minimal ornamental features.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house on a sloped grassy plot, featuring large windows, a raised deck, and a wide staircase entry. The exterior is white and beige with wooden accents and a perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide staircase, raised deck, and main entryway with large windows and wooden accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's elevation on stilts and the perimeter fence following the slope.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the simple, windowed back facade and the continuation of the fence along the property edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sloped terrain, undercroft area, and the path leading up to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide staircase, raised wooden deck, and large glass door with minimal overhang.
